edges.description: Shared Triton kernels manipulate EagleDraftInput buffers
V2 worker uses V2 mixins for cache location assignment
StandaloneDraftWorker parallels StandaloneWorker but for V2
V2 placeholder for Frozen-KV MTP overlap scheduling
CUDA graph runner captured by multi-layer worker
Uses DFlash accept/bonus computation and fused KV helpers
May use external corpus manager for SAM
Captured by EAGLEWorker for draft forward
DraftBackendFactory used to create draft attention backend
Both provide Triton kernels for speculative decoding
Uses config registry and download helpers
Uses Mistral tokenizer patching and config loading
Uses is_npu and torch_release from common
Uses orjson and other common imports indirectly
Uses torch and CUDA synchronization patterns
Uses bisect and typing from standard library

hyperedges.description: Family of speculative decoding algorithms: EAGLE, Standalone, Frozen-KV MTP, Multi-layer EAGLE, DFlash, NGRAM
SpecInput hierarchy: base class, EAGLE variants, DFlash, Frozen-KV MTP, Ngram
CUDA graph capture and replay runners for speculative draft and extend phases
Top-k index capture infrastructure for indexer and routed experts
HuggingFace transformers loading and compatibility layer
Large cluster of utility modules that depend on or re-export utils/common.py
Offloading infrastructure using host-shared memory and CPU/sharded-GPU offload
Weight synchronization pipeline: flatten tensors and gather across TP ranks
HTTP authentication and middleware patching for FastAPI/Starlette
Profiling and observability tools: torch profiler, trace merging, RPD conversion, NVTX hooks, device timers
Structured logging infrastructure for requests and scheduler status
Tokenizer backends: tiktoken custom tokenizer, HF tokenizer loader with patches
